core_principles: Safety First: Danger states must be alarmingly visible (Red/Yellow)
Clarity: Text must be readable against complex 3D backgrounds
Feedback: Every action (click, lock, tag) must have immediate visual/audio confirmation
Realism: Use industrial textures and technical typography

usage.primary: Action buttons, active tools, highlighting interactive parts
usage.danger: Error messages, 'Live' danger zones, accident alerts

layout_structure.app_shell: w-full h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background relative flex flex-col
layout_structure.hud_layer: absolute inset-0 z-10 pointer-events-none flex flex-col justify-between p-4 md:p-6
layout_structure.sidebar: w-80 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-md border-l border-border/50 h-full p-6 overflow-y-auto absolute right-0 top-0 z-20 transform transition-transform duration-300
layout_structure.bottom_bar: w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-6 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-4 shadow-2xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(234,179,8,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
buttons.tool_icon: w-14 h-14 rounded-xl border-2 border-white/10 bg-black/40 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all flex items-center justify-center text-2xl cursor-pointer active:scale-90

cards.glass: bg-zinc-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-xl rounded-xl

feedback.hazard_toast: bg-danger text-white border-l-4 border-black font-bold p-4 shadow-2xl animate-shake
feedback.success_toast: bg-success text-white border-l-4 border-black font-medium p-4 shadow-lg

camera.controls: OrbitControls with constrained polar angles (no looking from below ground)

interaction.hover: Cursor pointer, object highlight (emissive material intensity boost)
interaction.click: Camera zoom to focus target, open context menu

objects.generator_proxy: Group of meshes: Main body (Box), Control Panel (Box), Pipes (Cylinder), Valve (Torus). Color: Industrial Grey & Safety Orange.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `npm install three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei @react-three/postprocessing framer-motion lucide-react zustand`
Create a 'Store' using Zustand to manage the simulation state (currentStep, faults, lockedStatus, etc.).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the UI overlay (HUD) and R3F for the 3D scene.
Do not block the view: Keep UI on edges, leave center open for the 3D model.
Implement a 'Scenario Manager' that defines the steps for the procedure.
If no GLTF model is available, BUILD A COMPLEX PRIMITIVE MODEL. Do not just put a single cube. Make it look like a machine (Body + Pipes + Panel + Big Red Button).
Add 'glitch' or 'noise' effects to the HUD to make it feel like a real camera feed.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure HUD text has text-shadow or background blur to be readable over 3D.
accessibility.keyboard: Allow 'Tab' navigation to focus on UI elements.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable camera fly-ins if user prefers reduced motion.
